items.title: Casino mega-expansion — 35 slots & global network
items.summary: MasterNoder2 Casino now ships a tabbed lounge with 35 slot machines, global leaderboard, revenue reports, social sharing, mobile shells, Discord integration, and AI betting agents. Broadcast and PR #43 are critical infrastructure — review before merge. Play Store SHA updates Tuesday after developer registration.

items.summary: Stake with virtual coins, MN2 wallet balance, or PayPal-funded USD play balance. Deposit USD via PayPal, then switch currency in the casino.

items.summary: Classic Reels and Diamond Rush slots are live — spin for multi-symbol payouts on coins, MN2, or USD.
